sections.paragraph:
Original: אגמון

Transliteration: 'agmôn

Phonetic: ag-mone'

BDB Definition:

  1. rush, bulrush
    1. used as cord or line (of twisted rushes or spun of rush fibre)
    2. of the lowly, insignificant (metaphorically)
  2. sad, drooping
    1. of line of bulrushes
    2. bowing of the head (figuratively)
    3. of the lowly (metaphorically)

Origin: from the same as H98

TWOT entry: 19

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
